name: example-quality-eval
description: Example quality eval scenarios. Replace with your skill-specific prompts and assertions.

evals.name: basic-task-no-context
evals.prompt: Help me check the weather in Tokyo
evals.expected_behavior: Agent should use the weather skill to fetch current conditions

evals.name: task-with-context

conversation_history.content: I'm planning a trip to London next week
London is great! What would you like to know about your trip?

evals.prompt: What should I pack? Check the weather forecast
evals.expected_behavior: Agent should fetch London weather and give packing suggestions

evals.name: error-handling
evals.expected_behavior: Agent should handle non-existent location gracefully

assertions.description: Acknowledges location issue or provides best effort

evals.name: multi-location
evals.prompt: Compare the weather in New York and Los Angeles today
evals.expected_behavior: Agent should fetch weather for both cities and compare

comparisons.name: context-sensitivity
comparisons.description: Compare response with prior context vs without
comparisons.judge_criteria: Does the agent appropriately use conversation context to infer the location?
